description: Complex happy path with magnetic module: 11-step DNA cleanup including bead resuspension, magnet engage/disengage cycles, ethanol washes, and elution. Distinct from eval 12 (temperature module) — exercises module-labware-mismatch checks for the magnetic module when the sample plate sits on it (the config uses on_module='mag_mod'). Tests multi-step structure with reused tips for waste removal.
